reply.text: You give off I get what I want energy and sadly I believe it

messages.text: Tragic you believe it yet still here talking
im here doing my civic duty and supporting local chaos
That sounded like a very long way to say obsessed
That sounded like a very long way to say you clocked me
Relax superhero this is just a mirror fit
Mirror fit got me reconsidering life choices and savings
Savings is crazy you cant afford this vibe
That line needs a follow up
ill just write it off as character development
Bold talking for someone already folded in my DMs
Folded but still talking back sounds like im winning a little
Youre at like three percent progress relax
So what gets me to at least ten percent
Bare minimum is drinks and actual effort first
Drinks sound fair when are you free this week
